case_title: NEW SAN FRANCISCO LAUNDRY DBA PEERLESS/CALOU'S SER VS LUI RAYMOND AS PERSONAL GUARANTOR FOR NEW RED PL.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUI RAYMOND AS PERSONAL GUARANTOR FOR NEW RED PL.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LUI RAYMOND AS PERSONAL GUARANTOR FOR NEW RED PL.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $178.33 FILED BY NEW SAN FRANCISCO LAUNDRY DBA PEERLESS/CALOU'S SER AS TO DEFENDANT LUI RAYMOND AS PERSONAL GUARANTOR FOR NEW RED PL. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW SAN FRANCISCO LAUNDRY DBA PEERLESS/CALOU'S SER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUI RAYMOND AS PERSONAL GUARANTOR FOR NEW RED PL. $178.33 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $193.33, UPON PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF TO DELIVER TO DEFENDANT (9) RED COATS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
